ocr.text: In the context of the L3Harris Aerospace & Defense research contract pipeline for the period ending December 2023 and
denominated in Swiss Francs (CHF), the table provides a comprehensive overview of various research contracts categorized by
type, value, and status. The research contracts include R&DProjectA with a value of $1,500,000, currently marked as
InProgress; R&DProjectB valued at $2,300,000, which is Completed; R&DProjectC, with a value of $750,000, classified as
Pending; R&DProjectD, valued at $1,000,000, also InProgress; R&DProjectE, valued at $1,200,000, which has been
Completed; R&DProjectF, valued at $500,000, currently Pending; and R&DProjectG with a value of $800,000, which is
InProgress. The total number of projects listed amounts to 8, culminating in a TotalValue of $8,250,000 across all research
contracts. Each project reflects a strategic investment in advancing aerospace and defense capabilities, with the status of
completion indicating the varying stages of development, from InProgress to Completed and Pending.
ContractType  Value(CHF)
CompletionStatus  StartDate
EndDate  TotalContracts
ResearchContracts  Value  Status
R&DProjectA  1,500,000  InProgress
R&DProjectB  2,300,000  Completed
R&DProjectC  750,000  Pending
R&DProjectD  1,000,000  InProgress
R&DProjectE  1,200,000  Completed
R&DProjectF  500,000  Pending
R&DProjectG  800,000  InProgress
TotalProjects  8  TotalValue
The breakdown illustrates L3Harris's commitment to innovation and the importance of ongoing research in sustaining
competitive advantage within the aerospace and defense sector. The distribution of project values and statuses highlights the
dynamic nature of the research pipeline, where active management of project completion is essential for meeting both
organizational objectives and client expectations, thereby ensuring alignment with industry standards and regulatory
requirements.
